SourceA
Status Founder pulse Forge Terminal

Founder only

Site pulse. Strangers → data.

Pageviews, feedback inbox, and Brain chat counts — unlock once with your founder key. Form submissions also land here when the pulse worker is configured.

Unlock founder dashboard

This is not customer sign-in — it is your private analytics password for stranger activity on sourcea.app.

  1. Cloudflare: cd cloud/workers/sourcea-site-pulse-v1 && npx wrangler secret put FOUNDER_PULSE_KEY (pick a long random string)
  2. Rotate key: see cloud/workers/sourcea-site-pulse-v1/SETUP_LOCKED.md § FOUNDER_PULSE_KEY rotation
  3. Optional email alerts: npx wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY — paste API key from resend.com/api-keys
  4. Paste the same founder key below → inbox + stats appear

Public aggregates (no key): /sourcea/status

Loading…
